name: Kemerovo Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the hoist stripe bearing the oblast coat of arms
the principal field, recalling the flag of the Russian SFSR

description: A vertical bicolour with a narrow blue stripe at the hoist (one-third of the flag) charged with the oblast coat of arms, and a wide red field at the fly.
history: Adopted on 29 May 2002, with modifications on 21 January 2003 and 26 February 2020 reflecting changes to the oblast's coat of arms.

features.symbolism: blue hoist stripe with the coat of arms; red field after the flag of the Russian SFSR.
central French shield with a black coal-pyramid charged with hammer and pick, framed by an oak wreath bound with a red Order of Lenin ribbon bearing the year 1943 (the oblast's founding).
